sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_THEME_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_PUID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_THEME_GENERAL SET DISPLAYNAME = #v_PDISNM1#, DISPLAYNAME2 = #v_PDISNM2#, DISPLAYNAME3 = #v_PDISNM3#, DISPLAYNAME4 = #v_PDISNM4#, IMAGEURL = #v_PIMAGEURL#, TOPURL = #v_PTOPURL#, MAINURL = #v_PMAINURL#, MODIFYDATE = STR_TO_DATE(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), TOPHEIGHT = #v_TOPHEIGHT# WHERE UID_ = #v_PUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_THEME_GENERAL ( UID_, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, DISPLAYNAME3, DISPLAYNAME4, IMAGEURL, TOPURL, MAINURL, COMPANAYID, CREATORID, CREATORNM, CREATEDATE, MODIFYDATE, TOPHEIGHT, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_PUID#, #v_PDISNM1#, #v_PDISNM2#, #v_PDISNM3#, #v_PDISNM4#, #v_PIMAGEURL#, #v_PTOPURL#, #v_PMAINURL#, #v_PCOMPANYID#, #v_PCREATORID#, #v_PCREATORNM#, STR_TO_DATE(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), STR_TO_DATE(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), #v_TOPHEIGHT#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL SET USEFLAG = 'Y' WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL SET USEFLAG = NULL WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL
SET LANG = '1'
SET LANG = '2'
SET LANG = '3'
SET LANG = '4'
WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND CompanyID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SKIN_ITEMS ( UID_, SKINNUM, SKINNAME, SKINBGFLAG, SKINBGCOLOR, SKINBGIMAGE, SKINFONTCOLOR, SKINFONTOVERCOLOR, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_UID#, 1, #v_SKINNAME#, #v_SKINBGFLAG#, #v_SKINBGCOLOR#, #v_SKINBGIMAGE#, #v_SKINFONTCOLOR#, #v_SKINFONTOVERCOLOR#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT ROWPOS FROM TBL_TOPMENU_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND PAGEUID = #v_pPAGEUID# AND COLUMNPOS = #v_pCOLUMNPOS# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(UID_) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_TOPMENU_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND PAGEUID = #v_pPAGEUID# AND PARENTPAGEUID = #v_pPARENTPAGEUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT ROWPOS FROM TBL_TOPMENU_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND PAGEUID = #v_pPAGEUID# AND COLUMNPOS = #v_pCOLUMNPOS# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT COUNT(UID_) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = #v_pPORTLET_UID# AND PAGEUID = #v_pPPAGEID# AND PARENTPAGEUID = #v_pPPARENTPAGEID# AND OWNERPAGEUID = #v_pPORTLET_OWNERPAGEUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT ROWPOS FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = #v_pPORTLET_UID# AND PAGEUID = #v_PPORTLET_PAGEUID# AND COLUMNPOS = #v_pPCOLUMNPOS# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT ROWPOS FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = #v_pPORTLET_UID# AND PAGEUID = #v_pPORTLET_PAGEUID# AND COLUMNPOS = #v_pPCOLUMNPOS# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT ROWPOS FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = #v_pPORTLET_PREVPAGEID# AND COLUMNPOS = #v_pCOLUMNPOS# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT COUNT(UID_) FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL A WHERE (NOT EXISTS(SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = A.UID_)) AND DISPLAYNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_DISPLAYNAME# ,'%') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
AND GUBUNFLAG IN (#v_ARRPARAM#)
AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND GUBUNFLAG IN (#v_ARRPARAM#)

SELECT COUNT(UID_) FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = #v_PORTLET_UID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND PARENTPAGEUID IN (#v_STRQUERY#) AND OWNERPAGEUID = #v_PORTLET_OWNERPAGEUID#
AND OWNERPAGEUID = #v_PORTLET_OWNERPAGEUID#
$strSQL$
$strSQL$

SELECT A.* FROM TBL_PORTLET_GENERAL A WHERE DISPLAYNAME like CONCAT('%', #pDisplayName# ,'%')
AND PORTLET_TYPE = #pGubunFlag#
AND GUBUNFLAG = #pPageGubunFlag#
AND COMPANYID = #pCompanyID#
AND TENANT_ID=#tenantID# ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME ASC LIMIT #startRow#,#endRow#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTLET_GENERAL ( UID_, DISPLAYNAME, PORTLET_TYPE, SHOWTITLEBAR, COMPANYID, HEIGHT, GUBUNFLAG, WIDTH, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pNEWID#, '새 포틀릿', 1, 1, #v_pCOMPANYID#, 0, 0, 0, #tenantID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS_S ( UID_, PARENTMENUID, OWNERPAGEID, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_NEWUID#, #v_PARENTUID#, #v_PAGEID#, #v_DISPLAYNAME#, #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, #tenantID# )
INSERT INTO TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_LOGOS ( UID_, OWNERPAGEID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_PUID#, #v_PPAGEID#, #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE ( UID_, OWNERPAGEID, SKINNUM, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_PUID#, #v_PPAGEID#, #v_PSKINNUM#, #v_PDISPLAYNAME#, #v_PDISPLAYNAME2#, #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS ( UID_, PARENTUID, OWNERPAGEID, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_PUID#, #v_PPARENTUID#, #v_POWNERPAGEID#, #v_PDISPLAYNAME#, #v_PDISPLAYNAME2#, #tenantID# )
INSERT INTO TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS ( UID_, PARENTUID, PARENTMENUID, OWNERPAGEID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_PUID#, #v_PPARENTUID#, #v_PPARENTMENUID#, #v_POWNERPAGEID#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL SET USEFLAG = #v_pUSERFLAG# WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND GUBUNFLAG = #v_pGUBUNFLAG# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL SET USEFLAG = #v_pUSERFLAG# WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND GUBUNFLAG = #v_pGUBUNFLAG# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL SET DEFAULTPAGE = #v_PUSERFLAG# WHERE UID_ = #v_PUID# AND COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND GUBUNFLAG = #v_PGUBUNFLAG# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_ACL WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND ACCESSID = #v_ACCESSID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_ACL ( UID_, ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME, EDIT_RIGHT, VIEW_RIGHT, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_UID#, #v_ACCESSID#, #v_ACCESSNAME#, #v_EDIT_RIGHT#, #v_VIEW_RIGHT#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_ACL WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND ACCESSID = #v_ACCESSID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTLET_GENERAL SET DISPLAYNAME = #v_pDISPLAYNAME#, DISPLAYNAME2 = #v_pDISPLAYNAME2#, PORTLET_TYPE = #v_pPORTLET_TYPE#, URL = #v_pURL#, MAXURL = #v_pMAXURL#, SHOWTITLEBAR = #v_pSHOWTITLEBAR#, USERTYPE = #v_pUSERTYPE#, WIDTH = #v_pWIDTH#, HEIGHT = #v_pHEIGHT#, GUBUNFLAG = #v_pGUBUNFLAG#, FRAMETYPE = #v_pFRAMETYPE# WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTLET_URL WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND CREATORID = #v_CREATORID# AND USERTYPE = #v_OLDUSERTYPE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTLET_URL WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND CREATORID = #v_USERID# AND USERTYPE = #v_USERTYPE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTLET_URL( UID_, CREATORID, USERTYPE, URL, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_UID#, #v_USERID#, #v_USERTYPE#, #v_URL#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTLET_HTMLPAGE WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTLET_HTMLPAGE ( UID_, DISPLAYNAME, HTMLDATA, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_UID#, #v_DISPLAYNAME#, #v_HTMLDATA#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTLET_IMAGE WHERE UID_ = #v_UID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTLET_IMAGE ( UID_, IMAGEPATH, IMAGEWIDTH, IMAGEHEIGHT, IMAGETYPE, OPENMODE, WINDOWOPTION, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_UID#, #v_IMAGEPATH#, #v_IMAGEWIDTH#, #v_IMAGEHEIGHT#, #v_IMAGETYPE#, #v_OPENMODE#, #v_WINDOWSOPTION#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTLET_BOARD WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND CREATORID = #v_CREATORID# AND USERTYPE = #v_OLDUSERTYPE# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTLET_BOARD WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND CREATORID = #v_USERID# AND USERTYPE = #v_USERTYPE# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTLET_BOARD ( UID_, CREATORID, USERTYPE, BOARDID, ITEMCOUNT, ITEMFIELDS, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_UID#, #v_USERID#, #v_USERTYPE#, #v_BOARDID#, #v_ITEMCOUNT#, #v_ITEMFIELDS#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTLET_PARAMETERS WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND PARAMNAME = #v_PARAMNAVE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_MENUITEM_PARAMETERS WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND PARAMNAME = #v_PARAMNAVE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTLET_PARAMETERS ( UID_, PARAMNAME, PARAMVALUE, PARAMTYPE, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pUID#, #v_pPARAMNAME#, #v_pPARAMVALUE#, #v_pPARAMTYPE#, #tenantID# )
INSERT INTO TBL_MENUITEM_PARAMETERS ( UID_, PARAMNAME, PARAMVALUE, PARAMTYPE, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_UID#, #v_PARAMNAME#, #v_PARAMVALUE#, #v_PARAMTYPE#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_OWNERPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_LOGOS WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_OWNERPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_LOGOS ( UID_, OWNERPAGEID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_UID#, #v_OWNERPAGEID#, #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE ( UID_, OWNERPAGEID, SKINNUM, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, NORMALIMAGEPATH, IMAGEWIDTH, IMAGEHEIGHT, LINKURL, LINKLOCATION, WINDOWOPTION, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_UID#, #v_OWNERPAGEID#, #v_SKINNUM#, #v_DISPLAYNAME#, #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, #v_NORMALIMAGEPATH#, #v_IMAGEWIDTH#, #v_IMAGEHEIGHT#, #v_LINKURL#, #v_LINKLOCATION#, #v_WINDOWOPTION#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_OWNERPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_LOGOS WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_OWNERPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_ACL WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TOPMENU_ITEMS SET ALIGN = #v_pALIGN#, VALIGN = #v_pVALIGN#, LEFTMARGIN = #v_pLEFTMARGIN#, RIGHTMARGIN = #v_pRIGHTMARGIN#, TOPMARGIN = #v_pTOPMARGIN#, BOTTOMMARGIN = #v_pBOTTOMMARGIN# WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_pPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS SET DISPLAYNAME = #v_PDISPLAYNAME#, DISPLAYNAME2 = #v_PDISPLAYNAME2#, TENANT_ID = #tenantID#, LINKURL = #v_PLINKURL# WHERE UID_ = #v_PPUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_PPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS SET DISPLAYNAME = #v_PDISPLAYNAME#, DISPLAYNAME2 = #v_PDISPLAYNAME2#, TENANT_ID = #tenantID# WHERE UID_ = #v_PPUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_PPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_USERSTARTPAGE_ITEM SET LINKURL = #v_PLINKURL# WHERE UID_ = #v_PPUID# AND COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE SET NORMALIMAGEPATH = #v_PNORMALIMAGE#, OVERIMAGEPATH = #v_POVERIMAGE# WHERE UID_ = #v_PIMGUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_PPAGEID# AND SKINNUM = #v_PSKINNUM# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE SET IMAGEWIDTH = #v_PIMAGEWIDTH# WHERE UID_ = #v_PIMGUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_PPAGEID# AND SKINNUM = #v_PSKINNUM# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE SET IMAGEHEIGHT = #v_PIMAGEHEIGHT# WHERE UID_ = #v_PIMGUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_PPAGEID# AND SKINNUM = #v_PSKINNUM# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE SET LINKURL = #v_PLINKURL#, LINKLOCATION = #v_PLINKLOCATION#, WINDOWOPTION = #v_PWINDOWOPTION# WHERE UID_ = #v_PIMGUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_PPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE ( UID_, OWNERPAGEID, DISPLAYNAME, IMAGETYPE, NORMALIMAGEPATH, OVERIMAGEPATH, IMAGEWIDTH, IMAGEHEIGHT, LINKURL, LINKLOCATION, WINDOWOPTION, SKINNUM, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_PNEWUID#, #v_PPAGEID#, #v_PDISPLAYNAME#, #v_PIMAGETYPE#, #v_PNORMALIMAGE#, #v_POVERIMAGE#, #v_PIMAGEWIDTH#, #v_PIMAGEHEIGHT#, #v_PLINKURL#, #v_PLINKLOCATION#, #v_PWINDOWOPTION#, #v_PSKINNUM#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS SET IMAGEUID = #v_PNEWUID# WHERE UID_ = #v_PPUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_PPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE WHERE UID_ = #v_PIMGUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_PPAGEID# AND SKINNUM = #v_PSKINNUM# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(UID_) FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE WHERE UID_ = #v_PIMGUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_PPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS SET IMAGEUID = #v_EMPTYIMGID# WHERE UID_ = #v_PPUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_PPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS SET LINKURL = #v_PLINKURL#, LINKLOCATION = #v_PLINKLOCATION#, WINDOWOPTION = #v_PWINDOWOPTION# WHERE UID_ = #v_PPUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_PPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

update.isNotEmpty: UPDATE TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS_S SET DISPLAYNAME = #v_PDISPLAYNAME#, DISPLAYNAME2 = #v_PDISPLAYNAME2#, LINKURL = #v_PLINKURL#, LINKLOCATION = #v_PLINKLOCATION#, WINDOWOPTION = #v_PWINDOWOPTION#, TENANT_ID = #tenantID# WHERE UID_ = #v_P_SUB_UID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_P_SUB_PAGEID#
update.isEmpty: UPDATE TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS_S SET DISPLAYNAME = #v_PDISPLAYNAME#, DISPLAYNAME2 = #v_PDISPLAYNAME2#, TENANT_ID = #tenantID# WHERE UID_ = #v_P_SUB_UID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_P_SUB_PAGEID#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE SET NORMALIMAGEPATH = #v_PNORMALIMAGEPATH#, OVERIMAGEPATH = #v_POVERIMAGEPATH#, IMAGEWIDTH = #v_PIMAGEWIDTH#, IMAGEHEIGHT = #v_PPIMAGEHEIGHT#, LINKURL = #v_PLINKURL#, LINKLOCATION = #v_PLINKLOCATION#, WINDOWOPTION = #v_PWINDOWOPTION# WHERE UID_ = #v_PUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_P_SUB_PAGEID# AND SKINNUM = #v_PSKIN# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE ( UID_, OWNERPAGEID, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, IMAGETYPE, NORMALIMAGEPATH, OVERIMAGEPATH, IMAGEWIDTH, IMAGEHEIGHT, LINKURL, LINKLOCATION, WINDOWOPTION, SKINNUM, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_PNEWID#, #v_P_SUB_PAGEID#, #v_PDISPLAYNAME#, #v_PDISPLAYNAME2#, #v_IMAGETYPE#, #v_PNORMALIMAGEPATH#, #v_POVERIMAGEPATH#, #v_PIMAGEWIDTH#, #v_PPIMAGEHEIGHT#, #v_PLINKURL#, #v_PLINKLOCATION#, #v_PWINDOWOPTION#, #v_PSKIN#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS_S SET IMAGEUID = #v_PNEWID# WHERE UID_ = #v_P_SUB_UID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_P_SUB_PAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS_S SET IMAGEUID = #v_EMPTYPUID#, LINKURL = #v_PLINKURL#, LINKLOCATION = #v_PLINKLOCATION#, WINDOWOPTION = #v_PWINDOWOPTION# WHERE UID_ = #v_P_SUB_UID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_P_SUB_PAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IMAGEUID FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND PARENTUID = #v_PARENTUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_OWNERPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE WHERE UID_ = #v_PIMAGEUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_PARENTUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND PARENTUID = #v_PARENTUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_OWNERPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND PARENTUID = #v_PARENTUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_OWNERPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IMAGEUID FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS_S WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND PARENTMENUID = #v_PARENTUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_OWNERPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE WHERE UID_ = #v_PIMAGEUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_OWNERPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS_S WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND PARENTMENUID = #v_PARENTUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_OWNERPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS_S WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND PARENTMENUID = #v_PARENTUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_OWNERPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(DISPLAYNAME, ' ') DISPLAYNAME , IFNULL(DISPLAYNAME2, ' ') DISPLAYNAME2 , IFNULL(NORMALIMAGEPATH, ' ') NORMALIMAGEPATH , IFNULL(IMAGEWIDTH, 0) IMAGEWIDTH , IFNULL(IMAGEHEIGHT, 0) IMAGEHEIGHT , IFNULL(LINKURL, ' ') LINKURL , IFNULL(LINKLOCATION, ' ') LINKLOCATION , IFNULL(WINDOWOPTION, ' ') WINDOWOPTION FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_OWNERPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT ALIGN , VALIGN , LEFTMARGIN , RIGHTMARGIN , TOPMARGIN , BOTTOMMARGIN FROM TBL_TOPMENU_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = #v_pPUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_pPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS WHERE PARENTUID = #v_pPARENTUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_pOWNERPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY COLUMNPOS ASC
SELECT * FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS_S WHERE PARENTMENUID = '$v_PPARENTMENUID$' AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_POWNERPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY COLUMNPOS ASC
SELECT * FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS WHERE UID_ = #v_PUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_PPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE WHERE UID_ = #v_PUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_PPAGEID# AND SKINNUM = #v_PSKINNUM# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS_S WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_PAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_PAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT DEPTH FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pPORTLET_PAGEUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT DEPTH FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pPORTLET_UID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(UID_) FROM TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL WHERE THEMEUID = #v_PUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) topUserCount , ( SELECT COUNT(UID_) FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE THEMEUID = #v_PUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) portalPage FROM DUAL
SELECT DEPTH FROM TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT DEPTH FROM TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT DEPTH FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pPPARENTPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_THEME_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_PUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_TOPMENU_ITEMS WHERE PAGEUID = #v_pPAGEUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS WHERE PAGEUID = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT PARENTUID FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pTEMP# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS WHERE OWNERPAGEUID = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS_CHANGE WHERE OWNERPAGEUID = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS_CHANGE WHERE USERPAGEUID = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_ACL WHERE UID_ = #v_PUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT UID_ , PAGEUID FROM TBL_TOPMENU_ITEMS WHERE PAGEUID = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM TBL_PORTLET_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
SELECT * FROM TBL_PORTLET_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTLET_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTLET_HTMLPAGE WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTLET_IMAGE WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTLET_BOARD WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTLET_URL WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTLET_PARAMETERS WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS_CHANGE WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.* , B.DISPLAYNAME , B.DISPLAYNAME2 , B.NORMALIMAGEPATH FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_LOGOS A, TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE B WHERE A.UID_ = B.UID_ AND A.OWNERPAGEID = B.OWNERPAGEID AND A.OWNERPAGEID = #v_pPAGEID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY B.DISPLAYNAME ASC

SELECT A.UID_ , A.PARAMNAME , A.PARAMVALUE , A.PARAMTYPE , B.PARAMINFO , B.DESCRIPTION FROM TBL_MENUITEM_PARAMETERS A JOIN TBL_BUILTIN_PARAMETERS B ON A.PARAMTYPE = B.PARAMTYPE AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_PORTLET_CATEGORY WHERE TENANT_ID = $tenantID$
SELECT * FROM TBL_BUILTIN_PARAMETERS WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_BUILTIN_PARAMETERS
SELECT COUNT(UID_) FROM TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #uID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(UID_) FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #pageID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_SKIN_GENERAL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_TOPMENU_ITEMS WHERE (NOT (UID_ IN ($pArrParam$) ) ) AND PAGEUID = #pageUID# AND PARENTPAGEUID = #parentPageUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT UID_ FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS WHERE (NOT (UID_ IN ($pArrParam$) ) ) AND PAGEUID = #pageUID# AND PARENTPAGEUID = #parentPageUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TOPMENU_ITEMS( UID_, PAGEUID, PARENTPAGEUID, OWNERPAGEID, MENUITEMTYPE, DISPLAYNAME, WIDTH, HEIGHT, ROWPOS, COLUMNPOS, CANREMOVE, CANRESIZE, CANREPLACE, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #uID#, #pageUID#, #parentPageID#, #ownerPageID#, #menuItemType#, #displayName#, #width#, #height#, #rowPos#, #columnPos#, #canRemove#, #canResize#, #canReplace#, #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS( UID_, PAGEUID, PARENTPAGEUID, OWNERPAGEUID, PORTLETTYPE, DISPLAYNAME, WIDTH, HEIGHT, ROWPOS, COLUMNPOS, CANREMOVE, CANRESIZE, CANREPLACE, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #uID#, #pageUID#, #parentPageID#, #ownerPageID#, #portletType#, #displayName#, #width#, #height#, #rowPos#, #columnPos#, #canRemove#, #canResize#, #canReplace#, #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL( UID_, PARENTUID, DEPTH, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, CREATORID, CREATORNAME, CREATEDATE, WIDTH, HEIGHT, ROWLENGTH, COLUMNLENGTH, ROWSPLIT, COLUMNSPLIT, COMPANYID, THEMEUID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #uID#, #parentUID#, #depth#, #displayName#, #displayName2#, #creatorID#, #creatorName#, STR_TO_DATE(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), #width#, #height#, #rowLength#, #columnLength#, #rowSplit#, #columnSplit#, #companyID#, #themeUID#, #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL( UID_, PARENTUID, DEPTH, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, CREATORID, CREATORNAME, CREATEDATE, WIDTH, HEIGHT, ROWLENGTH, COLUMNLENGTH, ROWSPLIT, COLUMNSPLIT, GUBUNFLAG, COMPANYID, THEMEUID, TABLEVIEWOPTION, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #uID#, #parentUID#, #depth#, #displayName#, #displayName2#, #creatorID#, #creatorName#, STR_TO_DATE(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), #width#, #height#, #rowLength#, #columnLength#, #rowSplit#, #columnSplit#, #gubunFlag#,#companyID#, #themeUID#, #tableViewOption#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL SET DISPLAYNAME = #displayName#, DISPLAYNAME2 = #displayName2#, WIDTH = #width#, HEIGHT = #height#, ROWLENGTH = #rowLength#, COLUMNLENGTH = #columnLength#, ROWSPLIT = #rowSplit#, COLUMNSPLIT = #columnSplit#, THEMEUID = #pThemeUID# WHERE UID_ = #pPageID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL SET DISPLAYNAME = #displayName#, DISPLAYNAME2 = #displayName2#, WIDTH = #width#, HEIGHT = #height#, ROWLENGTH = #rowLength#, COLUMNLENGTH = #columnLength#, ROWSPLIT = #rowSplit#, COLUMNSPLIT = #columnSplit#, GUBUNFLAG = #gubunFlag#, THEMEUID = #pThemeUID#, TABLEVIEWOPTION = #tableViewOption# WHERE UID_ = #pPageID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_TOPMENU_ITEMS SET MENUITEMTYPE = #menuItemType#, DISPLAYNAME = #displayName#, WIDTH = #width#, HEIGHT = #height#, ROWPOS = #rowPos#, COLUMNPOS = #columnPos#, CANREMOVE = #canRemove#, CANRESIZE = #canResize#, CANREPLACE = #canReplace# WHERE UID_ = #uID# AND PAGEUID = #pageUID# AND PARENTPAGEUID = #parentPageUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS SET PORTLETTYPE = #portletType#, DISPLAYNAME = #displayName#, WIDTH = #width#, HEIGHT = #height#, ROWPOS = #rowPos#, COLUMNPOS = #columnPos#, CANREMOVE = #canRemove#, CANRESIZE = #canResize#, CANREPLACE = #canReplace# WHERE UID_ = #uID# AND PAGEUID = #pageUID# AND PARENTPAGEUID = #parentPageUID# AND OWNERPAGEUID = #ownerPageUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS SET COLUMNPOS = #columnPos# WHERE UID_ = #uID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #ownerPageID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS_S SET COLUMNPOS = #columnPos# WHERE UID_ = #uID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #ownerPageID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_TOPMENU_ITEMS WHERE (NOT (UID_ IN ( $strUIDList$ ) ) ) AND PAGEUID = #pageUID# AND PARENTPAGEUID = #parentPageUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS WHERE (NOT (UID_ IN ( $strUIDList$ ) ) ) AND PAGEUID = #pageUID# AND PARENTPAGEUID = #parentPageUID# AND OWNERPAGEUID = #callingPageID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_TOPMENU_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = #pUID# AND PAGEUID = #pageUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_CACHE WHERE PORTALPAGEID = #pageUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS_S WHERE OWNERPAGEID = #pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS WHERE OWNERPAGEID = #pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE WHERE OWNERPAGEID = #pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_TOPMENU_ITEMS WHERE OWNERPAGEID = #pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_SKIN_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = #pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
